news:news.news:title: Iran faces mass job losses due to ongoing conflict, while Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws are ruled against EU values.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran job losses due to conflict, Hungary anti-LGBTQ laws EU ruling, US envoy visit to Kyiv controversy, Japan arms export policy changes, El Salvador gang trial news

news:news.news:title: Kevin Warsh's nomination for Federal Reserve chair faces scrutiny, while Uber and Lyft drivers struggle with rising fuel costs amid geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: Federal Reserve chair nomination, gig economy in healthcare, Purdue Pharma settlement, Apple leadership change, impact of oil prices on markets

news:news.news:title: SpaceX is considering a $60 billion acquisition of Cursor, while AI backlash grows ahead of upcoming elections.
news:news.news:keywords: SpaceX acquisition news, Palantir manifesto summary, NASA ISS laptop upgrades, Tim Cook Apple legacy analysis, AI impact on elections

news:news.news:title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander won the Clutch Player of the Year award, while Leicester City faced relegation after a decade in the Premier League.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs analysis, coaching changes in sports, relegation impact on teams

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new state of matter in Uranus and Neptune, advanced imaging techniques, and breakthroughs in environmental and medical research.
news:news.news:keywords: state of matter in Uranus and Neptune, trillionth of a second imaging technology, trees glowing with electricity during storms, new termite control methods, lab-grown dolomite breakthrough

news:news.news:title: Tensions rise in the Middle East as the US maintains its blockade on Iran, while global incidents prompt security concerns in various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran relations and peace talks, Apple CEO transition, security incidents in Mexico, earthquake risks in Japan, IS-linked group rescues in DR Congo

news:news.news:title: Tim Cook will step down as Apple CEO, with John Ternus set to take over in September, amid rising oil prices and ongoing economic concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Apple leadership change, US tariff refunds, impact of oil prices on markets, Uber and Lyft driver challenges, US population crisis concerns

news:news.news:title: Tim Cook is stepping down as Apple CEO, with John Ternus set to take over in September, while Dyson launches a new travel-size hairdryer.
news:news.news:keywords: Apple leadership changes, Dyson new product launch, WhatsApp subscription service, Amazon price-fixing allegations, Silicon Valley consumer disconnect

news:news.news:title: The NBA playoffs continue with notable performances, while MLB faces injury setbacks and a significant rule controversy.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs updates, MLB injury news, PGA Tour schedule changes, NFL draft predictions, Victor Wembanyama DPOY award

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a new termite control method, breakthroughs in dolomite growth, and innovative solutions for microplastic removal from water.
news:news.news:keywords: pest control innovations, geological breakthroughs, microplastic removal solutions, bacterial DNA research, sustainable energy technologies

news:news.news:title: Zelensky Slams US Envoys as Hungary's Anti-LGBTQ Laws Clash with EU Principles
Tim Cook Abruptly Steps Down as Apple CEO, John Ternus Takes the Helm Amid Economic Turmoil
